name: golang-github-sirupsen-logrus-dev
title: golang-github-sirupsen-logrus-dev
summary: Logrus: a logging library for Go
description:
Logrus: a logging library for Go
Logrus is a structured logger for Go (golang), completely
API compatible with the standard library logger.
.
This package contains the source.
